title: Commercial office, Type II-B, egress door capacity short for occupant load
notes: First case to exercise EGR-EXIT-CAPACITY (absent from the baseline). IBC 1005.3.2 requires 0.2 in of door egress width per occupant; OL 300 needs 60 in of door width, the plan provides 48 in. Exit COUNT is fine (2 exits cover OL 300), so the capacity check is isolated. requires_citation=True, so the ungated baseline scores a fail (TP); --with-gate downgrades to needs_review until IBC 1005.3 text is in the corpus.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: II-B
Stories: 1
Building height: 22 ft
Per-story area: 12,000 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes
Design occupant load: 300
NFPA 13 sprinkler system. NFPA 72 fire alarm.
EXIT 1 (48 in total door width). EXIT 2.
WC 12 LAV 8.

ground_truth.rationale: OL 300 needs 60 in of egress door width (0.2 in/occupant, IBC 1005.3.2); only 48 in provided.
12,000 sf within the 23,000 sf allowable for B/II-B
OL 300 Group B needs 12 WC / 8 lav; 12 / 8 provided
